title: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park
tagline: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park — wildlife reserve of Goa

heroImage.alt: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park, Goa

overview.short: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park is a 240 square kilometres (93 sq mi) protected area located in the Western Ghats of West India, in Dharbandora taluk, Goa State
overview.description: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park is a 240 square kilometres (93 sq mi) protected area located in the Western Ghats of West India, in Dharbandora taluk, Goa State, along the eastern border with Karnataka. The area is situated near the town of Molem, 57 kilometres (35 mi) east of Panaji, the state capital of Goa. National Highway 4A divides it into two parts and the Mormugao - Londa railway line passes through the area. It is located between 15°15"30' to 15°29"30' N and 74°10"15' to 74°20"15' E. It contains several important temples dating to the Kadambas of Goa, and home to w

topPlaces.name: Mollem, Goa
topPlaces.description: Mollem (pronounced mole; the alphabet m is silent) is a small village in Goa,on NH4 near the border with Karnataka in the foothills of the Sahyadri Mountain range at the beginning of Anmod Ghat. It comes under the Dharbandora block.

topPlaces.name: Braganza Ghats
topPlaces.description: Braganza Ghats are a stretch of hill section in the Western Ghats alias Sahyadri Range at the Karnataka – Goa border. This 26 km ghat section rail road connects coastal Goa to the hinterlands of Karnataka and other parts.

topPlaces.name: Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla
topPlaces.description: Mahadeva Temple, Tambdi Surla is a 13th-century Hindu temple in the Kadamba style dedicated to Lord Shiva, one of the main deities in Hinduism, and is an active place of Hindu worship. It is an ASI protected Monument of National Importance in Goa.

topPlaces.name: Castle Rock, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Castle Rock is a village in the Uttara Kannada district of the Indian state of Karnataka. The village is located in the Western Ghats on the state's border with Goa - at an elevation of 621 m (2,040 ft).

topPlaces.name: Anmod
topPlaces.description: Anmod (officially recorded as Anamod) is a village in the Supa (Joida) taluk of Uttara Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Situated directly on the border between Goa and Karnataka, it serves as a primary transit point along the Belgaum-Goa route via the Anmod Ghat.

topPlaces.name: Dudhsagar Falls
topPlaces.description: Dudhsagar Falls (lit. 'Sea of Milk') is a four-tiered waterfall on the Mahadayi River in the Indian state of Goa. It is 60km from Panaji by road and is located on the Belagavi–Vasco Da Gama rail route about 46km east of Madgaon and 80km south of Belagavi .

items.note: Mollem (pronounced mole; the alphabet m is silent) is a small village in Goa,on NH4 near the border with Karnataka in the foothills of the Sahyadri Mountain range at the beginning of Anmod Ghat. It comes under the Dharbandora block.

Braganza Ghats are a stretch of hill section in the Western Ghats alias Sahyadri Range at the Karnataka – Goa border. This 26 km ghat section rail road connects coastal Goa to the hinterlands of Karnataka and other parts.

Mahadeva Temple, Tambdi Surla is a 13th-century Hindu temple in the Kadamba style dedicated to Lord Shiva, one of the main deities in Hinduism, and is an active place of Hindu worship. It is an ASI protected Monument of National Importance in Goa.

Castle Rock is a village in the Uttara Kannada district of the Indian state of Karnataka. The village is located in the Western Ghats on the state's border with Goa - at an elevation of 621 m (2,040 ft).

Anmod (officially recorded as Anamod) is a village in the Supa (Joida) taluk of Uttara Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Situated directly on the border between Goa and Karnataka, it serves as a primary transit point along the Belgaum-Goa route via the Anmod Ghat.

Dudhsagar Falls (lit. 'Sea of Milk') is a four-tiered waterfall on the Mahadayi River in the Indian state of Goa. It is 60km from Panaji by road and is located on the Belagavi–Vasco Da Gama rail route about 46km east of Madgaon and 80km south of Belagavi .

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mollem, Goa, Braganza Ghats, Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla, Castle Rock, Karnataka, Anmod.
